title: OCI Database System Terminated
description: Detects termination of OCI Database Systems (BaseDB, Exadata). Unauthorized database termination can result in critical data loss and service disruption.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.databaseservice.terminatedbsystem' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.databaseservice.deletedbhome')))
